title: Single-cell epigenomics reveals mechanisms of human cortical development.
author: Ziffra RS Kim CN Ross JM Wilfert A Turner TN Haeussler M Casella AM Przytycki PF Keough KC Shin D Bogdanoff D Kreimer A Pollard KS Ament SA Eichler EE Ahituv N Nowakowski TJ
content: S-EPMC8494642 PMC8494642 Single-cell epigenomics reveals mechanisms of human cortical development. During mammalian development, differences in chromatin state coincide with cellular differentiation and reflect changes in the gene regulatory landscape<sup>1</sup>.
